title: Active Management and Performance Measurement: A portfolio manager’s alpha is...
summary: Define alpha as excess return above the CAPM-predicted expected return.
prompt: A portfolio manager’s alpha is defined as:

options.text: Alpha represents the excess return of a portfolio above the expected return
Minimizes risk for a given return

solution: Alpha represents the excess return of a portfolio above the expected return predicted by the CAPM, indicating manager skill.
